name: Dragon Tamers
description:
Reiko Hanamura, a Japanese girl living in America, reconnects with her childhood friends Mark (“Mochi”) and Nick (“Nikki”) after returning from Japan. Reiko’s fierce older sister Reimi, and their intimidating father Kiyoshi. As the trio navigates life

Characters (List)

• Reiko Hanamura — Main female lead; playful, bold, loyal; childhood friend of Mark and Nick

• Nick (“Nikki”) — Smart, quiet, studious; Reiko’s childhood friend

• Mark (“Mochi”) Guerrero — Football captain; strong, protective, and confident

• Reimi Hanamura — Reiko’s older sister; fierce fighter and troublemaker

• Kiyoshi Hanamura — Reiko and Reimi’s father; ex-yakuza turned CEO

• Yuko Hanamura — Reiko and Reimi’s mother; “Dragon Tamer” of Kiyoshi

(Art and characters by @Pommuo. I don’t own any of it. I just like the WEBTOON.)

I don’t own the characters or the dragon tamers
creator: Kazuma_Ai
